summary: Round 3 reopens HNSW around distance_compute_inner_loop as the next explicit hypothesis. Round 2 improved the synthetic candidate-search profile but not the authoritative same-schema result, so HNSW remains functional-but-not-leading and starts round 3 from a hard-stop baseline rather than from a rewritten family verdict.
action: Use this artifact as the round 3 baseline. The next step is to profile distance_compute more precisely, then rerun the real same-schema authority lane before considering any future verdict-refresh feature.
